Skip to locales
Faber · porta · what do you read?
←→∴ ≡∪⇥
FABER
these six never localize
English en-US · English complete · full docs
ภาษาไทย th-TH · ไทย pilot · index + start
العربية ar · العربية partial · English prose fallback
हिन्दी hi · देवनागरी partial · English prose fallback
Tiếng Việt vi · Latin partial · English prose fallback
简体中文 zh-Hans · 简体中文 partial · English prose fallback
繁體中文 zh-Hant · 繁體中文 partial · English prose fallback

Faber is one semantic core with many renderings. Latin is the canonical interchange for code, not a privileged human language. Pick the documentation language you read; the glyphs are the same in all of them.

Status. English (en-US) is complete — docs, corpus, and tooling. Thai (th-TH) is the pilot locale: index and start/* have authored Thai prose; remaining sections still fall back to English. Every other locale ships reader packs and corpus pages with English prose fallback. Code samples below are the same salve-munde program from each pack — not proposed mock copy.

Agent index · Agent guide · Install

Same program, every pack

Each card shows the pack's salve-munde exemplar. The HIR is one; the rendering is the pack.

English en-US complete 
incipit {
  nota "Salve, Munde!"
}
English →
ภาษาไทย th-TH partial 
เริ่ม {
  แสดง "สวัสดี, โลก"
}
ภาษาไทย →
العربية ar partial 
بداية {
  اعرض "مرحبا، عالم"
}
العربية →
हिन्दी hi partial 
आरंभ {
  दिखाओ "नमस्ते, दुनिया"
}
हिन्दी →
Tiếng Việt vi partial 
bắtđầu {
  in "Xin chào, thế giới"
}
Tiếng Việt →
简体中文 zh-Hans partial 
入口 {
  显示 "你好，世界"
}
简体中文 →
繁體中文 zh-Hant partial 
入口 {
  顯示 "你好，世界"
}
繁體中文 →

All site locales

Grouped by what is true of the documentation tree today — not by population, and not by a future keyword-pack roadmap.

Complete — full documentation shipped
English en-US — full documentation; code via Latin pack (la)
Pilot — translated prose slice pilot · partial
ภาษาไทย th-TH — spaceless script; pilot translated slice
Partial — packs + corpus; English prose fallback partial
العربية ar — right-to-left; bidi isolation
हिन्दी hi — Devanagari clusters; Indic numerals
Tiếng Việt vi — Latin-but-not-English; NFKC diacritics
简体中文 zh-Hans — paired keywords; NFKC width collapse
繁體中文 zh-Hant — sibling of zh-Hans; traditional forms
Faber language · MIT license docs · install · github.com/faberlang
